nasb.text: And although the king was very sorry, yet because of his oaths and because of his dinner guests, he was unwilling to refuse her.

esv.text: And the king was exceedingly sorry, but because of his oaths and his guests he did not want to break his word to her.

cnv.text: 希律王非常憂愁，但是因為他的誓言和在座的賓客，就不願拒絕她。

ccb.text: 王听了这个请求，感到十分为难，但因为在众宾客面前起了誓，就不好拒绝。

csbs.text: 王就变得很忧愁，但因所起的誓，又因坐席的人，就不好拒绝她。
